rag_rules: Place assume/guarantee statements in component type annexes; use assign only in implementation annexes for output features or auxiliary variables
Use only identifiers visible in the current component scope; do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks are scoped to their owning component and must reference only visible symbols
Component type contracts should express input assumptions and output guarantees using concrete bounds or visible relations
Implementation contracts may include assignments but must bind to existing output features or declared auxiliary variables
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks with valid syntax: assume, guarantee, eq, const, assign
Guarantees in type scope should relate visible outputs to visible inputs; avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Deadline or Period directly in AGREE expressions without explicit model exposure
Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for output dependency contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters not exposed as model features
Model fusion and validation repair patterns
